parameters.query:
SELECT DISTINCT session_id
FROM public.stm_messages
WHERE ts >= now() - interval '24 hours'
ORDER BY session_id;

SELECT id, role, text, ts, session_id
FROM public.stm_messages
WHERE session_id = '{{$json.session_id}}'
ORDER BY ts ASC;

-- Aggregate silver notes for the last 7 days grouped by topic
select topic, json_agg(json_build_object(
  'session_id', session_id,
  'summary', summary,
  'importance', importance,
  'created_at', created_at
) order by created_at desc) as notes
from public.silver_notes
where created_at >= (now() at time zone 'Europe/Amsterdam') - interval '7 days'
  and created_at < (now() at time zone 'Europe/Amsterdam')
group by topic;

INSERT INTO public.gold_insights (
  topic,
  insight_key,
  insight,
  strength,
  priority
)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.topic }}',
  '{{ $json.insight_key }}',
  '{{ ($json.insight || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  {{ $json.strength }},
  {{ $json.priority }}
)
ON CONFLICT (topic, insight_key)
DO UPDATE SET
  insight = EXCLUDED.insight,
  strength = EXCLUDED.strength,
  priority = EXCLUDED.priority,
  updated_at = NOW();

select json_agg(json_build_object(
  'topic', topic,
  'insight_key', insight_key,
  'insight', insight,
  'strength', strength,
  'priority', priority
) order by priority desc, strength desc) as insights
from public.gold_insights;

insert into public.user_profile(user_id, profile_json, updated_at)
values (
  '{{$json.user_id}}',
  '{{$json.profile_json}}'::jsonb,
  now()
)
on conflict (user_id)
do update set profile_json = excluded.profile_json, updated_at = now();

parameters.content:
Daily → Bronze → Silver (pure condensation, no intelligence debt)

Every 2–3 days → Gold (short-term behavioral feedback, non-overlapping windows)

Weekly / bi-weekly / monthly → Platinum / Diamond (rare, high-signal, identity-level patterns)
